cover.headline: 3 AGENTS. 1 WINNER.
cover.subline: I TESTED THEM BACK TO BACK

paragraphs: I tested three AI agents. One costs 10x more — but the intelligence gap is only 15%.
Custom agents: $4,980/month. Perplexity Computer: $200. Claude Dispatch: $20. Here's my decision matrix:
Perplexity Computer runs 19 AI models in parallel — 400+ connectors, persistent memory. I set it a task at 11pm. It was done by morning.
Claude Dispatch pairs your iPhone to your Mac via encrypted bridge. I texted it a deal brief. 47 min later — done. My analyst: 3 hours.
For 90% of PE and consulting work, $20 is enough. The 10% where Perplexity still wins: overnight tasks that need your Mac to stay on, and 100+ source research runs.
For 90% of PE and consulting workflows, $20 is enough. Your data never leaves your machine.
I put together the full decision matrix — setup, privacy trade-offs, which wins for each workflow. Comment DISPATCH and I'll send it.
